2About SAT

The University Application Process

Understanding what top US universities look for helps students prepare strategically from day one.

🎓
Academic Qualifications
  • Transcript from 9th to 12th grade
  • Minimum GPA / Percentage required
  • 90% and above for Ivy League universities
📝
Standardised Tests
  • SAT — Scholastic Assessment Test
  • IELTS — English Language Proficiency
  • Both required for most US universities
👤
Student Profiling
  • SOP — Statement of Purpose
  • LOR — Letter of Recommendation
  • Essay writing
  • Extracurricular activities
  • Social activities if required
The SAT sits at the heart of every application. A strong score gives universities a standardised way to compare students from different education boards worldwide — giving you a significant competitive edge.
3About SAT

Why is the SAT Important?

A strong SAT score doesn't just open doors — it pays for your education.

⚖️
1. Standardised Comparison
  • Better view for comparing students from different education boards
  • 90% higher chance of admission with a strong score
  • Higher eligibility for merit-based scholarships
🧠
2. Self-Assessment of Core Skills
  • Know your strengths and weaknesses
  • 4X improvement in academic performance
  • Level up Communication, Problem Solving & Critical Thinking by 100%
💰
3. Scholarship Opportunities
  • Unlock financial aid & reduce college expenses
  • 10X higher chances for merit-based scholarships
  • Scholarships up to 2,93,000 AED
⭐ A strong SAT score can still improve your application, especially if:
Your GPA is average  ·  You're applying from a lesser-known school  ·  You want to stand out or apply for a scholarship

8Our Program

What's Unique About Leap?

We back every student with a score guarantee — the only SAT program that does this.

SCORE GUARANTEE
We promise a specific target score. If the student doesn't achieve it — free classes and training for the next attempt. No questions asked.
If not achieved
Free Classes + Retraining
for the next attempt
🏆
If student scores >1200 in diagnostic
1500+ Guaranteed
We target 1500 or above for high-potential students who start with a strong baseline.
📈
If student scores <1200 in diagnostic
200+ Points Jump Guaranteed
Even students starting from a lower base are guaranteed at least 200 points of improvement.
How we ensure students achieve the promised score
👤
Dedicated Student Success Manager
📅
Weekly P&T (Parents & Teachers) Meeting
📊
Progress Tracker
💬
Extended WhatsApp Support
📚
Revision & Vocabulary Booster
📖
Reading Workshops
🧩
Customised Learning
🎯
Additional Focus on Grey Areas

Leap Universe

LeapScholar isn't just SAT prep. We are Asia's #1 one-stop study abroad platform — supporting students from first thought to final destination.

Our Study Abroad Platform
  • One-stop platform — from application start until students arrive in their chosen country
  • End-to-end assistance — profile evaluation, college shortlisting, application submission, visa processing
  • Dream university focus — securing admission in desired universities
  • Unique counselling approach — experienced study-abroad consultants + student mentors
  • Career-oriented decisions — right academic and career choices with expert support
Exams We Cover
SAT
Scholastic Assessment Test
IELTS
English Proficiency
PTE
Pearson Test of English
DET
Duolingo English Test
👤
1:1 Expert Counselling
185,000+ students trained. 8 years counselling experience. Personalised guidance for every student.
🏫
Personalised University Shortlist
Curated list based on score, GPA, budget, and career goals. No generic lists.
📋
University Application
End-to-end support — essays, forms, recommendations, and submissions.
🌍
Hassle-Free Visa
Expert visa processing team — smooth documentation and timely approvals.
💰
Best-Fit Scholarship
Identify and apply for scholarships suited to the student's profile.
📍
Global Locations
UAE · India · Singapore · USA — global platform with local expertise.

The Onboarding Process

Here's exactly what happens after you enrol — a clear, structured 5-step journey to get your student started within 24–48 hours.

✍️
Score Agreement
Score guarantee agreement signed by parent
📋
Onboarding Form
Onboarding form + diagnostic test taken by student
🖥️
Dashboard Access
Dashboard access provided to student
🤝
PTM Scheduled
Meeting with parent, student, SSM & assigned tutor
▶️
Classes Start
Within 24–48h of diagnostic completion
What you can expect
  • Score guarantee agreement signed before classes begin
  • Personalised programme designed based on diagnostic results
  • PTM within the first week — parents always in the loop
  • Classes begin within 48 hours of diagnostic completion
  • WhatsApp group for student, parent & success manager
Your Support Team
  • Assigned Lead Teacher — English or Maths specialist
  • Student Success Manager — dedicated point of contact
  • Academic Counsellor — university planning & applications
  • Support Team — admin, scheduling, queries
Take the Diagnostic Test ↗
Ready to begin? The first step is the free SPT Diagnostic Test. It takes 30–40 minutes and gives us everything we need to design a programme specifically for your student.
